hooks.command: ROOT="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}"; test -x "$ROOT/.harness/bin/decision-hook" || { echo 'decision-hook missing' >&2; exit 2; }; exec "$ROOT/.harness/bin/decision-hook" claude
ROOT="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}"; LAUNCHER="$HOME/.local/bin/agent-harness-live-status"; test -n "$ROOT" && test -x "$LAUNCHER" && "$LAUNCHER" start "$ROOT" claude >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
ROOT="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}"; test -x "$ROOT/.harness/bin/decision-hook" || { echo 'decision-hook missing' >&2; exit 2; }; exec "$ROOT/.harness/bin/decision-hook" claude
